selection: 按 4–7 岁 阅读者的常用词频与中小学词汇标记筛选

words.translation: n. 国王, 君主；vt. 使...成为君主
words.definition: n. a male sovereign; ruler of a kingdom

words.translation: n. 公主, 王妃, 女巨头
words.definition: n. a female member of a royal family other than the queen (especially the daughter of a sovereign)

words.translation: n. 鱼, 鱼肉, 鱼类, 接合板；vt. 钓, 钓鱼, 查出, 用接合板连接
words.definition: n. any of various mostly cold-blooded aquatic vertebrates usually having scales and breathing through gills

words.translation: n. 骨头, 骨, 骨制品；vt. 剔骨
words.definition: n. rigid connective tissue that makes up the skeleton of vertebrates

words.translation: n. 婴孩
words.definition: n. a very young child (birth to 1 year) who has not yet begun to walk or talk

words.translation: n. 王后, 女王；vt. 立为女王
words.definition: n. the only fertile female in a colony of social insects such as bees and ants and termites; its function is to lay eggs

words.translation: num. 十七, 十七个
words.definition: n. the cardinal number that is the sum of sixteen and one

words.translation: n. 淑女, 夫人, 女士, 贵妇
words.definition: n. a polite name for any woman

words.translation: n. 一点点, 少许, 一会儿, 短时间；a. 小的, 很少的, 幼小的, 琐碎的, 短暂的, 矮小的
words.definition: n. a small amount or duration

words.translation: n. 魔术, 魔法；a. 魔术的, 有魔力的, 不可思议的
words.definition: n. any art that invokes supernatural powers

words.translation: a. 年轻的, 无经验的, 朝气蓬勃的；n. 青年们, 幼小动物, 崽
adv. 离去
words.definition: r. from a particular thing or place or position (`forth' is obsolete)

words.translation: n. 理由, 原因, 理智, 道理, 前提, 理性；vt. 说服, 推论, 辩论
words.definition: n. a rational motive for a belief or action

words.translation: n. 亲爱的人；a. 亲爱的, 昂贵的, 严重的, 急迫的
n. 秘密, 机密, 秘诀, 秘方；a. 秘密的, 极机密的, 隐蔽的, 暗中的, 神秘的, 偏僻的
words.definition: n. something that should remain hidden from others (especially information that is not to be passed on)

words.translation: n. 男孩
n. 头, 头脑, 领袖, 脑袋, 最前的部分；vt. 为首, 朝向, 前进, 用头顶
words.definition: n. the upper part of the human body or the front part of the body in animals; contains the face and brains

words.translation: a. 美丽的
words.definition: a. delighting the senses or exciting intellectual or emotional admiration

words.translation: n. 四分之一, 一刻钟, 季度, 地区；vt. 四等分, 肢解

words.translation: n. 小心, 照料, 忧虑；vi. 关心, 介意
words.definition: n. the work of providing treatment for or attending to someone or something

words.translation: pron. 每件事物, 所有事物
words.definition: n. Whatever pertains to the subject under consideration;

words.translation: n. 眼睛, 视力, 看；vt. 看, 注视
words.definition: n. the organ of sight

words.translation: n. 脸, 面容, 正面, 外观；vt. 面对, 朝, 正视, 面临
words.definition: n. the front of the human head from the forehead to the chin and ear to ear

words.translation: n. 早晨, 早上, 初期
words.definition: n. the time period between dawn and noon

words.translation: n. 办公室, 部, 公职, 职责
words.definition: n. place of business where professional or clerical duties are performed

words.translation: adv. 一次, 曾经, 一旦；conj. 一旦, 一经

words.translation: a. 人工制成的, 成功的, 创造的；make的过去式和过去分词
words.definition: s. produced by a manufacturing process; rope and nails"

words.translation: n. 口袋, 钱袋, 钱, 容器；vt. 装...在口袋里, 隐藏, 抑制, 私吞, 搁置, 击...入袋

words.translation: prep. 直到, 在...以前, 迄；conj. 直到...为止

words.translation: n. 门

words.translation: a. 远的, 久远的, 遥远的；adv. 甚远地, 很, 到很深的程度, 到很远的距离

words.translation: n. 爱, 恋爱, 爱情, 爱好, 性爱；vt. 爱, 爱好, 爱慕

words.translation: n. 想法, 思想, 思维, 关心, 挂念；think的过去式和过去分词

words.translation: n. 臀部, 蔷薇果, 忧郁；a. 熟悉内情的
words.definition: n. either side of the body below the waist and above the thigh

words.translation: num. 十八, 十八个

words.translation: adv. 的确, 实在, 真正地, 甚至

words.translation: n. 王子, 亲王, 国君, 贵族, 诸侯, 有权势的大人物

words.translation: n. 衣服

words.translation: n. 水, 雨水, 海水, 水位, 水面, 流水；vt. 给...浇水, 供以水, 注入水, 使湿

words.translation: a. 忙碌的, 热闹的, 没空的；vt. 使忙
words.definition: a. actively or fully engaged or occupied

words.translation: n. 去, 离去, 工作情况, 地面状况, 行为；a. 进行中的, 流行的, 成功的, 现存的

words.translation: n. 瓶子, 酒瓶；vt. 装瓶, 抑制, 围困

words.translation: n. 跳舞, 舞蹈, 舞会；v. 跳舞
